data: A breezy mix of movies, music, TV, and entertainment staples.
Which movie features the line 'May the Force be with you'?
It is a space saga with Jedi and lightsabers.
'May the Force be with you' is one of the signature lines from the Star Wars franchise.
He was often called the King of Pop.
The TV series 'Friends' is set primarily in New York City.
The characters often gather at Central Perk.
'Friends' follows a group of friends living in New York City.
What is the name of the cowboy toy in 'Toy Story'?
His pull-string voice is a big part of the first movie.
Woody is the cowboy doll and one of the central characters in 'Toy Story.'
The wizarding school in the Harry Potter series is called _____.
Its four houses include Gryffindor and Slytherin.
Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry is the main school in the Harry Potter series.
Which superhero is also known as the Dark Knight?
Batman is often called the Dark Knight.
Which animated film features the song 'Let It Go'?
The song is performed by Queen Elsa.
The Beatles were originally from Liverpool, England.
Their hometown is strongly associated with Merseybeat.
The Beatles formed in Liverpool, England.
